headline: Assessing Viatris (VTRS) Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Price Moves
summary: Why Viatris (VTRS) Is On Investors’ Radar Viatris (VTRS) is drawing attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with a negative move over the past month but a positive total return over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Viatris. At a share price of US$13.51, Viatris has recently seen a 16.24% 1 month share price decline after a strong 15.97% 3 month share price return, set against a 55.38% 1 year total shareholder return that hints at shifting sentiment...
